name: rolepod-dblab
description: Data-layer safety + truth verifier MCP server + 5 shipped skills (db-introspect, db-query, db-explain, db-migrate-verify, db-write) for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: rolepod-dblab
plugins.description: 5 MCP tools (rolepod_db_introspect/query/explain/migrate_verify/write) + 5 user-invocable skills. The data-layer limb of rolepod: introspect schema, assert DB state as verify-evidence, read query plans, detect schema drift (SQLAlchemy vs live), and mutate data behind a transaction preview→confirm→commit/rollback guard. Works standalone with a connection string; pair with the `rolepod` parent plugin (detected via the marker file `<git-root>/.rolepod/parent-active`) and dblab becomes the DB evidence/gate provider — evidence routes to `<git-root>/.rolepod/evidence/` with `manifest.json` per Extension Protocol v1. Postgres-only in v1; see `rolepod-dblab doctor` for readiness.
